feature_name: Auth hardening: remove header-auth bypass, fail closed on default secrets, pin CORS, reconcile sync docs
sandbox_note: As of 2026-07-01, Dean installed build-essential — the sandbox now HAS a C linker (cc). cargo test runs locally; future runs are NOT deferred and pre-push works locally. As of 2026-07-02, the sandbox also lacked Playwright Chromium system libs (libglib-2.0.so.0); fixed via `sudo npx playwright install-deps chromium` — future specialist sessions have working E2E.
qa_sequencing: Mandatory QA review runs ONCE at end of feature, after T5, covering the whole branch (T1 auth boundary + T2 secrets + T3 CORS) plus the DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD audit charter — NOT per-task. QA-mandatory flag stays armed for the post-T5 stage.
verify_stage_carry_forwards: F2-6 (fresh docker compose up on unedited .env fails at ${VAR:?} interpolation): not executable in sandbox — no docker binary. Build-specialist must attempt `docker compose config` with secrets unset IF docker is available in its session; otherwise this criterion is verified by Dean on his deployment box before merge. Do not report F2-6 as verified without one of those two.

tasks.title: Server auth: Bearer-only ctx_from_headers + wrapper/core split + sync refactor + mod.rs test migration
tasks.description: Make ctx_from_headers Bearer-only (delete x-space-id/x-user-id fallback at types.rs ~120-133). Split the five sync-invoked handlers into HTTP wrapper + *_for_ctx core (get_tasks/create_task/update_task_meta/update_task_status in tasks.rs; get_lists in lists.rs), bodies moved verbatim. Delete headers_for_ctx in sync.rs; sync_pull/sync_push authenticate once then call cores with &ctx — no synthesized headers. Migrate ~40 mod.rs header-auth tests to a real-JWT auth_headers(state,user_id,space_id) helper calling issue_token + Bearer; add 401 negative tests. NO #[cfg(test)] RequestCtx shortcut (trap 1).
tasks.done_when: ctx_from_headers has no header fallback; five *_for_ctx cores per Design sigs; headers_for_ctx deleted; sync builds no HeaderMap; auth_headers mints real token; ~40 sites converted; negative tests (headers-only/garbage/expired/no-membership -> 401) pass; existing sync idempotency/conflict tests re-run green (trap 2); cargo fmt/clippy/test pass (SDE verifies cc linker present, else cargo check/clippy and defer test to CI explicitly).
tasks.sde_report: Bearer-only ctx_from_headers (fallback deleted, F1-1); wrapper+core split for 5 handlers with verbatim bodies; headers_for_ctx deleted, sync passes &ctx (F1-3); 36 header-auth test sites migrated to real-JWT auth_headers helper + 4 new 401 negative tests (40->44, F1-2); RequestCtx constructed nowhere except ctx_from_headers. No scope flags; T2-T5 untouched.
tasks.verify_report: Build-specialist (after Dean installed build-essential — linker now present): web lint/check/test PASS (366/366); cargo fmt PASS; cargo clippy PASS; cargo test PASS (44/44 in 27.19s, incl the 4 new 401 negatives and sync idempotency/conflict/role-scope tests re-run through the new &ctx path). Fully green — no deferral. NOTE: final adversarial QA of T1's auth boundary happens in the end-of-feature QA review (post-T5), not per-task.

tasks.title: Boot preflight (fail-closed secrets) + dotenvy local-dev sourcing + compose/env wiring
tasks.description: Add JWT_SECRET_DENYLIST/DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD_DENYLIST consts + pure validate_secret + validate_boot_secrets in types.rs (re-exported via mod.rs). main() calls dotenvy::dotenv() (log loaded file/none) then validate_boot_secrets() pre-DB; aggregated non-zero exit on failure. app_state() drops unwrap_or_else defaults -> .expect(...). Add dotenvy to Cargo.toml. .env.example ships JWT_SECRET=/DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD= empty with REQUIRED comments. docker-compose.yml uses ${VAR:?message}. scripts/2-serve.ps1 pre-check for repo-root .env. README documents .env requirement.
tasks.done_when: Server exits non-zero with clear preflight when JWT_SECRET unset/empty/tasksync-dev-secret/change-me (every mode); same for DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD unset/empty/tasksync; boots on valid values. validate_secret unit tests cover full matrix with NO env mutation. GREP-VERIFY (note 2a): grep whole test tree, confirm nothing calls app_state()/main()/route-constructors before trusting cargo-test-unaffected; record result. cargo test passes with secrets UNSET. dotenvy loads repo-root .env; cargo run + scripts/2-serve.ps1 boot from clean checkout with populated .env; real env wins. docker compose up on unedited .env fails at interpolation. cargo fmt/clippy/test pass (linker caveat).
tasks.sde_report: T2 complete, all gates green LOCALLY: cargo fmt PASS, clippy --all-targets PASS, cargo test 51/51 (44 + 7 new pure validate_secret tests, zero env mutation). Functional verification of built binary: unset/denylisted/valid matrix behaves per F2-1..F2-5; real env correctly beats .env. Grep-verify 2a PASS: only test module is #[cfg(test)] in routes/mod.rs, all 46 sites use test_state(); seed.rs reads only DATABASE_URL/SEED_* — no app_state(). Changes staged, progress log updated, no scope creep (.env.example VITE_* lines correctly left for T4). CAVEAT: F2-6 (fresh docker compose up on unedited .env fails at interpolation) NOT executed locally — no docker binary in sandbox. ${VAR:?} syntax is standard; see verify_stage_carry_forwards.

tasks.title: Pin CORS to an additive env-configurable allow-list
tasks.description: Replace allow_origin(Any)/allow_headers(Any) in main.rs with a boot-parsed additive allow-list: baked-in capacitor://localhost + http://localhost:5173 + http://localhost:4173, unioned with comma-separated CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS. Pure parse_allowed_origins(raw)->Result<Vec<HeaderValue>,String> (malformed -> boot failure naming entry). CorsLayer: AllowOrigin::list, unchanged enumerated methods, allow_headers([AUTHORIZATION, CONTENT_TYPE]), no allow_credentials. Wire CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS into docker-compose.yml; commented example in .env.example; document in README reverse-proxy note.
tasks.done_when: No allow_origin(Any)/allow_headers(Any); headers exactly [AUTHORIZATION, CONTENT_TYPE]. parse_allowed_origins unit tests (unset/empty->defaults; valid->union; malformed->named boot error). Allow-list includes capacitor://localhost (trap 3, verified vs capacitor.config.ts no iosScheme), localhost:5173, localhost:4173. Non-allow-listed origin gets no ACAO header (documented curl check for verify stage). docker-compose+.env.example+README wiring present. npm run test:e2e:smoke passes unmodified; cargo fmt/clippy/test pass (linker caveat).
tasks.sde_report: T3 complete, ALL gates green locally: cargo fmt PASS, cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings PASS, cargo test 56/56 (51 + 5 new parse_allowed_origins unit tests), npm run test:e2e:smoke PASS 20/20 unmodified (closes F3-6). Implementation matches design exactly: DEFAULT_ALLOWED_ORIGINS baked-in trio, pure parse_allowed_origins with additive union + fail-closed malformed handling (boot exit 1 naming the entry), AllowOrigin::list, allow_headers([AUTHORIZATION, CONTENT_TYPE]), no allow_credentials, compose/.env.example/README wiring. F3-2 VERIFIED LOCALLY via live curl against a running server: allowed origin gets ACAO echo, https://evil.example.com gets NO ACAO header, preflight shows authorization,content-type only — removed from verify_stage_carry_forwards. Progress log updated. No scope creep.

tasks.title: Client legacy-mode removal (headers.ts + auth.ts token-only)
tasks.description: Shrink headers.ts to token-only (getAuthToken/setAuthToken/buildHeaders); delete AuthMode, getAuthMode, setAuthMode, tasksync:auth-mode key const, spaceId/userId/role module consts (retires VITE_SPACE_ID/VITE_USER_ID/VITE_ROLE reads); remove those three VITE_* lines from .env.example. In auth.ts drop AuthState.mode and 'legacy' source; hydrate() starts with localStorage.removeItem('tasksync:auth-mode') then token-only flow. Update headers.test.ts, auth.test.ts (add stale-legacy-mode test), tasks.test.ts (drop auth-mode seeding).
tasks.amendment_2026_07_02: Design Addendum (exec plan) resolved the T4 block. Files array above IS the amended fence (original six + +layout.svelte + helpers/idb.ts + five spec files). Additional done_when per amended T4 breakdown entry: storageScopeFromAuth drops state.mode (authenticated -> space:{space_id}:user:{user_id} unchanged; ALL non-authenticated states -> existing 'token-anonymous' literal unconditionally); idb.ts UNTOUCHED; NO code deletes/migrates legacy-default DBs (orphan decision); four resolveScopedDbName copies in helpers/idb.ts resolve from tasksync:auth-user only (valid user -> space:user, else 'token-anonymous'); 10 seeding sites drop their tasksync:auth-mode line only; NEW non-@smoke auth.spec.ts E2E case (stale legacy device -> anonymous + key removed + signed-out task lands in tasksync_token-anonymous + pre-seeded tasksync_legacy-default marker DB untouched); grep-verify 2b amended to FULLY clean: zero tasksync:auth-mode anywhere under web/ plus the already-clean VITE_SPACE_ID/VITE_USER_ID/VITE_ROLE/x-role result; touched non-smoke specs run explicitly on Chromium in addition to the smoke suite.
tasks.done_when: headers.ts token-only (no x-space-id/x-user-id/x-role, no AuthMode/tasksync:auth-mode/get/setAuthMode). auth.ts has no mode/'legacy' source; hydrate() clears stale key then resolves anonymous with no network for token-less device. New auth.test.ts: seed legacy mode no token -> hydrate -> anonymous + key removed, no error/loop. tasks.test.ts no longer seeds auth-mode. GREP-VERIFY (note 2b): grep web tree + E2E fixtures/config, confirm no VITE_SPACE_ID/VITE_USER_ID/VITE_ROLE / x-role / tasksync:auth-mode references remain; record result. npm run lint/check/test + test:e2e:smoke pass.
tasks.sde_report: T4 (amended) complete, ALL gates green locally: npm lint PASS, check PASS (0 errors/0 warnings), unit tests 367/367, e2e smoke 20/20, explicit non-smoke Chromium run of the five touched specs 45/45 (incl the NEW stale-legacy E2E case: anonymous + key removed + signed-out task in tasksync_token-anonymous + legacy-default marker DB untouched), cargo fmt/clippy/test 56/56 regression re-run. Implementation matches the Design Addendum exactly: headers.ts token-only; .env.example VITE_* lines removed (T2/T3 entries untouched); auth.ts mode/legacy dropped + hydrate() one-time removeItem; +layout.svelte storageScopeFromAuth -> unconditional 'token-anonymous' for all non-authenticated states; idb.ts verified UNTOUCHED; no legacy-default delete/migrate code; four resolveScopedDbName copies in helpers/idb.ts mirrored (resolve from tasksync:auth-user only); 10 seeding lines deleted. Tests: new auth.test.ts stale-key hydrate test, headers.test.ts rewritten (4 token-only tests), tasks.test.ts seeding dropped, new non-@smoke auth.spec.ts case. Changes staged, progress log updated. Closes F1-4 and F1-5.
tasks.grep_2b_ruling: Recorded 2026-07-02 (main session REVIEWED AND ACCEPTED). Grep 2 (VITE_SPACE_ID/VITE_USER_ID/VITE_ROLE) and grep 3 (x-role): ZERO occurrences. Grep 1 (tasksync:auth-mode): exactly 5 remaining occurrences, ruled as satisfying the criterion's INTENT — auth.ts:7 (the addendum-mandated cleanup-writer constant used solely by hydrate()'s removeItem) plus 4 test lines that deliberately seed the stale key to prove its removal (auth.test.ts x2, auth.spec.ts x2). A literal zero was unsatisfiable while implementing the mandated cleanup + its proving tests. All 14 original target occurrences (4 helper reads + 10 seeds) eliminated; ZERO readers of the key remain. Criterion 2b considered satisfied; F1-4/F1-5 closed.
tasks.blocked_report: SDE stopped pre-implementation per escape hatch; NO code changed (only a dated blocked-entry appended to the exec plan progress log). The design's grounding claim ('no Svelte component reads AuthState.mode or the legacy source — only auth.ts and its tests') is FALSE. Finding A (design gap): web/src/routes/+layout.svelte:186 — storageScopeFromAuth(state) reads state.mode to derive the IDB storage scope key: authenticated -> space:{space_id}:user:{user_id}; otherwise state.mode === 'token' ? 'token-anonymous' : 'legacy-default'. Removing mode forces an undesigned decision about the anonymous scope key AND the fate of data stored under 'legacy-default' on upgraded devices — an offline-first data-scoping question, out of SDE scope. Finding B (derivative, unresolvable until A is decided): tasksync:auth-mode referenced outside T4's fence in six E2E files — web/tests/e2e/helpers/idb.ts (4 inlined resolveScopedDbName() copies mirroring the layout scope function, defaulting to 'legacy') plus 10 seeding sites (auth.spec.ts x3, offline.spec.ts x4, perf.spec.ts x1, myday.spec.ts x1, sidebar-drag.spec.ts x1). Positive: grep 2b otherwise clean — VITE_SPACE_ID/VITE_USER_ID/VITE_ROLE/x-role appear ONLY in headers.ts itself; that half of T4 is unobstructed. Awaiting PE Design Addendum before T4 re-routes with an amended file fence.
tasks.blocked_findings_grounded: EM re-verified 2026-07-02: state.mode read at +layout.svelte:186 inside storageScopeFromAuth (also used at lines 190/256/322 for scope keying); 14 tasksync:auth-mode occurrences across the six E2E files (helpers/idb.ts x4 + 10 seeding sites).

tasks.title: ARCHITECTURE.md sync reconciliation
tasks.description: Rewrite docs/ARCHITECTURE.md Sync/Conflicts to reality: HTTP-only POST /sync/pull + /sync/push (delta-v1), whole ListRow/TaskRow rows scoped by role+list grants, since_ts->cursor_ts, 500-change cap, op_id-keyed rejected[], arrival-order whole-row overwrite with coalesce(?, column) — no version vectors/per-field LWW/WebSocket/tiebreak. Diagram [WebSocket/HTTP]->[HTTP]. Move aspirational protocol AND the non-existent Change entity + change table SQL into a labeled 'Future sync protocol (aspirational - not implemented)' Roadmap subsection.
tasks.done_when: Sync bullet/Sync Protocol/Conflict Rules describe real impl, no current-state changeset/version-vector/per-field-LWW/WebSocket claims; Change entity + change table SQL moved to Roadmap (no change table in migrations); aspirational protocol preserved under labeled Roadmap subsection. ARCHITECTURE.md is the only behavior doc changed (exec plan + tech-debt-tracker are process artifacts, not the 'one doc' target — noted so acceptance doesn't false-flag F4-3).

operational_criteria_note: The three operational-consequence acceptance criteria (release-notes items) are NOT a code task — they are satisfied by the PR description authored at the /done stage.

resolved_open_questions.q1_header_bypass: Remove the header-auth bypass ENTIRELY. No env-gate, no opt-in flag.
resolved_open_questions.q2_default_secrets: Fail closed ALWAYS (no production flag). Refuse to boot if JWT_SECRET or DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD is unset/empty or matches a known-default literal. Denylist: JWT_SECRET in {tasksync-dev-secret, change-me}; DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD = tasksync. Local dev must keep working via an explicit documented secret source (mechanism is a design decision).
cors_origins_confirmed: operator PWA origin(s) via env allow-list (self-hosted, not hardcoded)

process_constraints.qa_review: MANDATORY — adversarial pass on everything touching ctx_from_headers and the sync push/pull internal call path. Not optional for this feature.
process_constraints.qa_charter_addendum: Review note 1 (Fable): QA must determine what DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD actually gates in server/src/routes/auth.rs (never deep-audited). If it is a shared master-login mechanism rather than a seed/dev convenience, flag it as a BRANCH-2 candidate finding — do NOT fix it in this branch.
process_constraints.no_verify: Forbidden. All quality gates must pass.
process_constraints.stage_gates: One stage per invocation, explicit user approval between stages.
process_constraints.cargo_linker_note: cargo test requires a C linker (cc) missing in the main session sandbox; specialist sessions must verify they can link before trusting cargo test results. CI has it.

scope.finding_1_header_bypass: server/src/routes/types.rs:120-133 ctx_from_headers falls back to trusting client x-space-id/x-user-id headers with no Bearer token = unauthenticated impersonation of any user incl admin. Remove fallback (or gate behind explicit opt-in env var, default off). Blast radius: (a) ~40 integration tests in server/src/routes/mod.rs authenticate via headers -> refactor to mint real JWTs, must exercise real auth path not a bypass helper; (b) sync_push/sync_pull in server/src/routes/sync.rs:58-69 re-invoke handlers by synthesizing headers -> refactor to pass RequestCtx directly (handler sig changes in tasks.rs/lists.rs); (c) client legacy mode in web/src/lib/api/headers.ts (x-space-id/x-user-id/x-role fallback + tasksync:auth-mode localStorage key) removed; unused x-role header dies with it.
scope.finding_2_default_secrets: server/src/routes/types.rs:41-42 JWT_SECRET defaults to 'tasksync-dev-secret', DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD defaults to 'tasksync'. Server should refuse to start (or at minimum log prominent warning) when unset in production. Decide exact behavior in discovery/design.
scope.finding_3_cors: server/src/main.rs:48-58 is allow_origin(Any)+allow_headers(Any). Restrict to configured origins, env-configurable. MUST include Capacitor iOS origin (typically capacitor://localhost / ionic://localhost — verify against web/capacitor.config.ts) plus dev localhost. Must not break PWA origin, Capacitor iOS shell, local dev, Playwright E2E (check how E2E authenticates and its origin).
scope.finding_4_doc_reconciliation: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md describes changesets/version-vectors/WebSocket/per-field LWW sync that does not exist; reality is whole-task rows over HTTP with a since_ts cursor. Update ARCHITECTURE.md to describe reality (this is the 'exactly one doc' for this change; aspirational protocol can move to a Roadmap section).

operational_consequences: Setting/changing JWT_SECRET invalidates all existing 30-day tokens -> every device logs out and must re-login after deploy. Deploy when devices can re-auth.
If current Docker deployment relies on the default JWT_SECRET (check docker-compose.yml env), server refuses to boot after upgrade until env var set -> preflight note in PR/release notes.
Any device still in legacy auth mode will 401 after upgrade -> must re-login; client should clear stale mode and route to login gracefully.
CORS pinning must not break PWA origin, Capacitor iOS shell, local dev, Playwright E2E.
PWA update lag: old client JS may hit new server for a while; old token-mode clients unaffected, old legacy-mode clients fail until refresh+re-login — acceptable, document it.

remediation_arc.note: Three-branch arc approved by Dean from a 6-finding read-only quality review on main (all gates green: 366 web unit tests, lint, svelte-check, cargo fmt/clippy).
remediation_arc.branch_2_later: Findings 3(sync)+5 sync-contract changes: COALESCE field-clear bug + op_id-keyed applied results / staleness check.
